Localization.Description: The deletion or change of multiple accounts can indicate an attacker attempting to block owners from accessing Aria Operations

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} deleted users {datafield3} in Aria Operations on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed the accounts of users {datafield4} in Aria Operations on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted users {datafield3} in Aria Operations on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the accounts of users {datafield4} in Aria Operations on host {event_src.host}
